## Checklist

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s` adds the
      `Signed-off-by:` trailer). Required by DCO — see `RELICENSING.md`.
- [ ] No secrets, real PII, or real financial data are included in the diff.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] No self-host setup docs added (see README — self-hosting is not
      supported).
